raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable by the left arm and there is enough lateral clearance to make gentle contact with its side. No other objects obstruct the left side of box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is lightly supported from the left side, preventing uncontrolled motion while a detaching push is applied."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side of box_2 and the tabletop region to the right of box_1 is clear so that box_2 can slide there. The left arm is already stabilizing the opposite side of box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is detached from box_1 and has been slid ~40 cm to the right, now resting directly on the tabletop, no longer in contact with or obstructing box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is fully exposed on the tabletop with no objects stacked on it. Both arms have unobstructed access to approach the box from opposite lateral sides.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is firmly held between the two arms and lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable by the left arm and there is enough lateral clearance to make gentle contact with its side. No other objects obstruct the left side of box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is lightly supported from the left side, preventing uncontrolled motion while a detaching push is applied.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side of box_2 and the tabletop region to the right of box_1 is clear so that box_2 can slide there. The left arm is already stabilizing the opposite side of box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is detached from box_1 and has been slid ~40 cm to the right, now resting directly on the tabletop, no longer in contact with or obstructing box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is fully exposed on the tabletop with no objects stacked on it. Both arms have unobstructed access to approach the box from opposite lateral sides.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is firmly held between the two arms and lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop, accomplishing the task of picking up the darker box.
